A value investor is getting paid to maybe own SpaceX. Duan Yongping sold puts on newly public SpaceX, collecting about $2.32M on 1,000 contracts, his classic "happy to take delivery" play. The 5-month puts carry an ~25% yield, about 60% annualized. His reason: "supporting Musk's dream." $SPCX

data.title: Housing is a Human Right Calls on Mayor Bass and L.A. City Council to Stop Failed ‘Inside Safe’ Program as L.A. Homeless Count Rises
data.description: In Los Angeles, Housing is a Human Right is urging Mayor Bass and the L.A. City Council to terminate the ineffective 'Inside Safe' program as the homeless population count in L.A. continues to climb. The organization is pushing for alternative solutions to address the rising crisis as the number of homeless individuals in the city reaches unprecedented levels.

data.title: Crypto advocacy groups urge passage of CLARITY Act as ethics rules encounter resistance. US lawmakers have limited time before 2026 elections to address a crypto bill.
data.description: Industry groups are urging US legislators to act swiftly on a comprehensive crypto market structure bill before the 2026 elections. Time is running out, with the window to address this crucial legislation narrowing. It is imperative that lawmakers take action soon to ensure the stability and growth of the crypto market.
